reviews.review_description: This game is beyond terrifying! I absolutely love it! Great job, i will buy the full version if im allowed

reviews.review_title: PLS ADD multiplayer BUT ITS A GOOD GAME
reviews.review_description: add multiplayer places its scary to to to to to to TO SCARY
Love the graphics and sound! I was so scared!

developer_response.body: Glad to hear :) If you liked the demo, the full game is available now with more content on the way!

reviews.review_description: This is so fricking scary I love it. 4/5 just because I haven’t played all of it yet.

developer_response.body: I'm happy to hear you loved the scares! If you end up liking the demo once you finish it, the full game is available now with more content on the way!

reviews.review_description:
I gave 5 stars just because it is simple but scary with amazing graphics (standalone)!

I scared 2 times in under 8 min or so! 
But i got caught 

Maybe an id to make the flash Light a little bit brighter?

Really cool expierience! Thanks!

OW HAHA BTW CORRECTION THE FLASHLIGHT CAN BE SHAKED FOR MORE BRIGHTER LIGHT LOL.

developer_response.body: Glad you enjoyed! Thank you for the feedback :)

reviews.review_title: I WAS SO SCARED I QUIT
reviews.review_description: As soon as the lights flickered out i quit too scary but i get why some ppl will like it, sound design and graphics are amazing its just too scary for me well done devs its amazing, im gonna keep this one my quest to scare other ppl
This game is terrifying, good job.

developer_response.body: Thank you! We can't wait to share more about what's to come! ;)

reviews.review_description: It was just far too buggy to even play through
First time playing I literally jumped up hurling my headset across my room screaming. My Fitbit said my heart rate spiked to 110 😂😂😂

developer_response.body: Glad to hear we provided a good scare! Keep an eye out for what's next!

reviews.review_description: The Shadow is indeed very obsessive
I got scared asf when the flashlight wasn’t shaking right😂. When’s the full release date plz🙏🙏🙏🙏😩😩😩😩

developer_response.body: Stay tuned! More info to come :) Glad you enjoyed!

reviews.review_description:
If you like horror at all please play this game. It's quite short but well worth a download.
It made me scream like a little girl. Sounds and lighting are top notch. 💀

developer_response.body: Really glad you enjoyed it! More to come! ;)

reviews.review_description: Wow

developer_response.body: Glad to hear you enjoyed it! Keep an eye out for new stuff to come! ;)

reviews.review_title: Really good game, just needs multiplayer
reviews.review_description: This game is really fun, and really scary, I love the graphics and I wish it was multiplayer so I can play with and terrify my friends!
Best horror game ive ever played in vr

developer_response.body: We are so glad you enjoyed it! Stick around, lots of fun scares are in store ;)

reviews.review_description: Ok to be honest its fun, a good jumpscare BUT motion controllers request some work, sometimes the motion is not accurate, turns are weird specially when lamp is on use (on shake)  Good enough to give a try!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! We'll definitely making improvements in the full release! Stay tuned, glad you enjoyed! :)

reviews.review_description: I love this game its so scary I love the way its so dark is this a full game when this going to full game I love to buy it very scary

developer_response.body: Glad you enjoyed it! Keep an eye out for the full paid version of the game with more content ;)

reviews.review_description: It's a great concept. It scared the crap out of me, this game is unrated yet so scary.

developer_response.body: glad you enjoyed! Stick around for the full release ;)

reviews.review_description: First I was scared then made fun of it and got jumpscared I screamed loud definitely give it a try

developer_response.body:
Karma at it's finest >:)

Stick around for the full version for more scares!

reviews.review_description: This game is scary asf when’s the full release I need to get my friends to sh*t themselves 🤣😭🙏
